sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24690" key="dia/desis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διά-δεσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">διαδέω</etym>) <sense id="n24690.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bandaging,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:7:9:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.9.7</biblScope></bibl>, Heliod.ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:10:18:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.18.3</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
